source_basis: Supabase changelog checked 2026-06-19: new public-schema tables may not be exposed to the Data API automatically, so grants/exposure must be explicit.
Supabase RLS docs checked 2026-06-19: member policies should use TO authenticated plus auth.uid() ownership predicates, not role-only checks.
Supabase API security docs checked 2026-06-19: Data API grants do not replace RLS; exposed tables need row policies.
Owner direction: verified signup, app-user product access, user-owned LLM/SNS/KIS tokens, and no production DB/deploy/secret mutation without explicit approval.
non_goals: No Supabase project connection or mutation.
No SQL migration file and no production DB apply.
No secret, provider token, bank account number, customer PII, or payment record in repository files.
No external deploy, OAuth callback validation, payment provider, bank API, KIS credential activation, or live order path change.

route_groups.label: Public pre-auth intake
allowed: request id + contact applicant status lookup
route_groups.tenant_source: request id plus original contact for applicant lookup only

route_groups.label: Approved app-user self-service
allowed: own integration metadata and write-only secret submission

route_groups.label: Approved app-user product read
allowed: own portfolio, analysis, market context, trade read, engine state, agent output, manuals
route_groups.tenant_source: Supabase auth.uid() ownership policy plus backend validation

route_groups.label: Server worker / engine
allowed: per-user safety and kill switch checks
server-audited order-intent creation after risk gate
forbidden: single global owner state for external members
live execution before per-user safety evidence

surfaces.member_policy: select own request where (select auth.uid()) = user_id

surfaces.current_local_state: runtime-configured instruction generated for deposit_pending applicants
surfaces.member_policy: select own deposit instruction where (select auth.uid()) = user_id
surfaces.admin_policy: server-audited owner issuance; no bank account values in repo

surfaces.member_policy: select own approval events where (select auth.uid()) = target_user_id

surfaces.current_local_state: local grant attached to active membership
surfaces.member_policy: select own grant where (select auth.uid()) = user_id

surfaces.current_local_state: local encrypted-vault provider records keyed by session username
surfaces.member_policy: select own redacted metadata where (select auth.uid()) = user_id; write secrets only through backend route
surfaces.admin_policy: no routine plaintext admin read; deletion/rotation audited

surfaces.member_policy: select/insert/update own profile where (select auth.uid()) = id

surfaces.current_local_state: member can submit own risk acknowledgements
surfaces.member_policy: select/insert own acknowledgements where (select auth.uid()) = user_id
select own account where (select auth.uid()) = user_id
select own holdings snapshots where (select auth.uid()) = user_id
select own analysis reports where (select auth.uid()) = user_id
select own engine state where (select auth.uid()) = user_id; update own requested mode only through backend validation

surfaces.current_local_state: global safety settings for local owner
surfaces.member_policy: select/update own allowed limits where (select auth.uid()) = user_id through backend validation
select own intents; insert only through backend risk gate where (select auth.uid()) = user_id
select own audit events where (select auth.uid()) in (target_user_id, actor_user_id)
surfaces.admin_policy: server-audited append only; retention policy required before delete

surfaces.current_local_state: market metadata and public documentation can be shared when not user-private
surfaces.member_policy: public/reference access is separated from user-private product rows
surfaces.admin_policy: no private tenant rows in public tables

security_invariants.statement: Production member scope comes from Supabase Auth JWT/auth.uid() or server session subject, never from a client-provided user_id.
Self-service write APIs ignore request-body user_id for target selection and derive the target from the authenticated session.
Every tenant_private, tenant_financial, tenant_control, tenant_secret_metadata, tenant_trading, tenant_product, and tenant_audit table has RLS enabled before external users.
Client-side filters are display hints only; they are not used as the authorization boundary.
Owner/admin cross-tenant reads or mutations run only through server-side audited operations.
Supabase service role and secret keys are server-only and never appear in browser bundles, logs, reports, or repository files.
Provider/KIS tokens are write-only at the API boundary and responses return only configured state and masked hints.
Engine loop state, risk limits, kill switch, order queues, and order intents are user-scoped before live-readiness features are exposed to members.
Public applicant lookup requires request id plus contact and never exposes Owner notes/events, account grants, subscription grants, or product rows.
Shared public/market reference data is separated from tenant-private portfolio, engine, analysis, and secret rows.

required_test_cases.description: Anonymous callers cannot read product surfaces.
Signed guest sessions receive 403 on product surfaces.
Member A cannot read or mutate Member B tenant rows in staging RLS tests.
Member cannot call Owner/admin membership or engine control routes.
Owner cross-tenant membership transitions create immutable audit events.
Secret/token writes never return plaintext values.
Engine state, kill switch, risk settings, and order intent queue are user-scoped.
Applicant status lookup requires request id plus original contact and strips internal fields.

future_supabase_checks: RLS enabled on every tenant-owned table.
Policies use TO authenticated plus auth.uid() ownership predicates.
UPDATE policies include both USING and WITH CHECK.
Data API grants are explicit and reviewed after RLS policies exist.
Security Advisor and Performance Advisor findings are reviewed before launch.

launch_blockers_remaining: Production secret storage and deletion/rotation policy not implemented.
Payment evidence retention policy not approved.
